author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 21: 2 Tier-3 ipv6 docs (extension-header semantics + flow-label management). net/ipv6/exthdrs.md (TLV encoding + per-EH-type handlers: HBH/Pad1/PadN/RouterAlert/Jumbo/IOAM/Calipso, DestOpt/TunnelEncapLimit/HomeAddr, RH0-dropped-per-RFC-5095, RH2 Mobile IPv6, RH4 SRv6 + all RFC 8986 actions End/End.X/End.T/End.DT/End.AS/End.AM/End.BPF, SRv6 iptunnel + HMAC, Calipso CIPSO labeling, GRO/GSO offload — 13 REQ / 12 AC, 0 open) + net/ipv6/flowlabel.md (RFC 6437 flow-label mgmt: IPV6_FLOWLABEL_MGR setsockopt full surface w/ all sharing modes + flags, auto_flowlabel modes 1/2, flowlabel_consistency, flowlabel_state_ranges, flowlabel_reflect (RFC 7690), per-netns table + fl_max_size, LATENT_ENTROPY-seeded hashrnd — 12 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open). 12 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: ~81 .design docs. Next: net/ipv6/tcp-v6.md + net/ipv6/udp-v6.md (per-IPPROTO v6 wrappers — mostly inherit IPv4 TCP/UDP Tier-3 abstractions, doc covers v6-only socket-level diffs).
